name: Next.js (App Router)
description: Preset for Next.js applications using App Router. Handles server components, client components, and API routes.

routing.route_discovery: Scan app/ directory structure for page.tsx files

special_considerations: Server Components cannot be tested with Playwright state capture
API routes (/app/api/**) should be tested separately
Dynamic routes ([slug]) need test data for each param combination
Loading.tsx and Error.tsx need dedicated test scenarios

extra_rules.name: Server component awareness
extra_rules.description: Tests must not assume client-side state for server-rendered content
